item.name: Tales of Adventure: One Bard's Journey IV
item.description:
A detailed record of one adventurer's continuing path to becoming a realm-renowned bard─so detailed, in fact, that all who read it come to swear they experienced the events firsthand.

Use to instantly level bard to 90 and complete all job quests and physical ranged DPS role quests up through “Laid to Rest.” Cannot be used outside large settlements. Automatic logout will commence upon usage.
